error_signature: no incoming requests in server logs from Evolution API
title: Production webhook not receiving data from Evolution API
symptom: The n8n webhook does not trigger when WhatsApp messages are sent, and there are no incoming requests logged from the Evolution API.
not_this_if: Manual webhook test in n8n succeeds
root_cause: The production webhook URL may not be accessible from the Evolution API servers due to Cloudflare's security settings or misconfiguration of environment variables in n8n, preventing the webhook from receiving data.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable WEBHOOK_URL to your production webhook URL.
Set the environment variable N8N_PROXY_HOPS to the appropriate value.
Restart the n8n instance to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Configure the WEBHOOK_URL and N8N_PROXY_HOPS environment variables and restart n8n.
